expertPicksList.title: Expert Picks
expertPicksList.description: Elevate your home with these blue paint colors, chosen by the experts, that are sure to imbue your home with lasting beauty and style.

image1.altText: An open living room with vaulted ceiling, couch, ottoman and light blue walls

popularList.title: Popular Blues
popularList.description: Find your perfect shade of blue within Sherwin-Williams' selection of popular blue paint colors, each designed to bring beauty and character to your home.

image1.altText: A dining room with round table and sky blue walls

image2.altText: A living room with vaulted ceiling and dark blue statement wall

imageDetailsList.description: Bring some vibrancy to a relaxing hue with our brighter shades of blue.
imageDetailsList.caption: Bright

imageDetailsList.description: Nothing creates a calmer mood than our mid-tone blues.
imageDetailsList.caption: Mid-Tone

imageDetailsList.description: Our muted blues appear almost neutral and maximize your serenity.
imageDetailsList.caption: Muted

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: From the ocean's vast depths to the endless expanse of the sky, blue is a calming, versatile hue that offers a spectrum of moods. Whether you're creating a tranquil retreat, a vibrant, energetic hub or want to make a dramatic statement, the perfect blue color paint awaits.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Blue Paint Colors | Expert Picks | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover the blue paint colors that designers adore, from energizing to calming shades. Find the perfect blue hue for your space.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Blue typically evokes calm, peace and serenity, much like the sky and ocean. With so many options, it's no wonder blue paint is popular among DIYers and professionals alike. If you want to incorporate blue into your space, check out these popular blues that have been long-time crowd favorites.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Our Most Popular Blue Paint Colors | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover our most popular blue paint colors from Sherwin-Williams — a curated collection of timeless, designer-approved hues ranging from soft mid-tones to rich navy. Explore tips on undertones, room lighting, and perfect pairings to find your ideal blue.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: The subtle elegance of light blues soothe the senses, making them an impeccable choice for creating serene retreats. Whether you envision a calming bedroom, a refreshing bathroom or other spa-like sanctuary, the delicate charm of light blue offers an inviting embrace.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover a soothing selection of light blue paint colors from Sherwin-Williams — soft pastels and airy sky tones ideal for guest baths, laundry rooms, nurseries, or any space craving calm. Explore undertones, lighting tips, and design-friendly pairings.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Blue is a foundational hue in nature and design, celebrated for its ability to inspire serenity, confidence and creative thought. Among blue's vast spectrum, the darker shades are particularly alluring. Dark blue paint colors are more than a trend; they're a statement that offers richness and drama that transforms your space into something unique and truly extraordinary.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Explore deep and sophisticated blue paint ideas on Sherwin-Williams. Our dark blue paint colors bring bold elegance to cabinets, living rooms, exterior walls, and more — with expert tips on lighting, undertones, and styling for the perfect finish.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Cool blues are a versatile palette that can evoke everything from crisp energy to profound serenity. These cool-toned hues truly excel at creating spaces for quiet contemplation. Infuse your space with an expansive, fresh, calming hue, perfect for a bedroom retreat or a welcoming living room.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover a curated palette of cool blue paint colors from Sherwin-Williams — from soft pastels to deep navy hues. Find the perfect blue for your living room, bathroom, or exterior and explore expert tips on undertones, lighting, and trending home decor styles.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Imagine blue, but with the comforting glow of a sunset. While typically evoking cool serenity, a unique spectrum of warm blue paint colors is ready to redefine your space. These aren't just blues; they're an invitation to experience a "hug-like" feeling, wrapping your home in tranquility and warmth.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover warm blue paint colors from Sherwin-Williams — cozy, inviting shades that combine blue’s calm with soft undertones for bedrooms, living spaces, and exteriors. Explore expert tips on lighting, accents, and color pairings.

expertPicksList.title: Expert Picks
expertPicksList.description: Bring calm, nourishing energy to any space with these greens handpicked by our Color Experts.

image1.altText: A dining room with farm house table, bench seating, and cool green walls

popularList.title: Popular Greens
popularList.description: Muted, earthy or deep — these trending green paint colors bring fresh, natural vibes to every home.

image1.altText: A coastal dining room with wicker chairs, fireplace, and green walls

image2.altText: A bluegreen wall with side table, and flowers in a vase

imageDetailsList.description: A brighter shade of green can intensify green’s natural vitality in your space.
imageDetailsList.caption: Bright

imageDetailsList.description: Our mid-tone greens can hit the sweet spot between lively color and refreshing calm.
imageDetailsList.caption: Mid-Tone

imageDetailsList.description: When a traditional neutral is too subdued, a muted green can provide that perfect little splash of color.
imageDetailsList.caption: Muted

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Green brings the tranquility and vitality of nature indoors, from the soothing whisper of a forest canopy to the vibrant burst of a spring meadow. It's a color that resonates with comfort, growth and renewal, making it a perennial favorite for transforming spaces. The spectrum of green is vast and beautiful, but these popular hues truly shine.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Green Paint Colors | Popular Greens | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Explore Sherwin-Williams’ most popular green paint colors for interiors and exteriors, from calming sages to dramatic deep greens.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Green is a color that breathes life into every corner, whispering tranquility and grounding your home in nature's embrace. Tapping into insights from our own Color Experts, we've curated a collection of trendy yet timeless green colors, meticulously selected to infuse your home with unparalleled calm and sophisticated energy.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Green Paint Colors | Expert Picks | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover the green paint colors that designers adore, from energizing to calming shades. Find the perfect, verdant green for your space.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Warm green paint colors for those looking to create spaces that feel inherently cozy, nurturing and inviting. These captivating hues, characterized by their gentle yellow or earthy infusions, provide depth and anchor a room, making them perfect for cultivating character in and around your home.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Green Paint Colors | Warm Greens | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Explore warm green paint colors with yellow undertones—perfect for creating timeless, earthy, and inviting interiors or exteriors.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Turn to cool green paint colors when you want to cultivate an elegant, refreshing environment. These captivating shades, characterized by their subtle blue or gray undertones, will make any space feel expansive and invite a sense of calm while remaining connected to nature for an incredibly stylish look.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Green Paint Colors | Cool Greens | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover cool green paint colors with calming blue or gray undertones—perfect for creating airy, peaceful, and contemporary spaces.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Delve into green's spectrum of richer, more saturated hues to unlock a world of unparalleled depth and elegance. These profound shades offer more than just color; they create an atmosphere, a mood and a statement that elevates a design, inviting a sense of luxury into any space.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Green Paint Colors | Dark Greens | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Create bold statements and cultivate sophisticated environments with Sherwin-Williams' collection of dark green paints.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Light green paint colors emerge as true champions of tranquility and understated elegance, designed to make a space feel expansive while infusing it with serenity. From the soft, muted tones that evoke a quiet meadow to the delicate vibrancy of new growth, light greens create a versatile foundation for any room, inviting a sense of peace into your home.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Green Paint Colors | Light Greens | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover Sherwin-Williams light green paint colors, from a soothing olive to a vibrant lime, perfect for refreshing interiors and exteriors.

expertPicksList.title: Expert Picks - Cool Neutrals
expertPicksList.description: Discover the cool side of calm with these hand-picked cool neutrals that pair effortlessly with various hues.

expertPicksList.title: Expert Picks - Warm Neutrals
expertPicksList.description: Elevate your space with these expertly chosen warm neutral paint colors, designed to bring warmth and livable luxury to any room.

popularList.title: Popular Cool Neutrals
popularList.description: Popular for their modern appeal and versatility, these cool neutrals are always in style.

image1.altText: A spa-like bedroom with wicker bench, neutral duvet, and gray walls.

image2.altText: An office wall painted a light gray Morning Fog SW 6255.

popularList.title: Popular Warm Neutrals
popularList.description: Loved for their timeless appeal and comforting versatility, these popular warm neutrals are timeless crowd favorites.

imageDetailsList.description: Our bright neutrals provide the warmth of color while pairing easily with other hues.
imageDetailsList.caption: Bright

imageDetailsList.description: Create the sense of a clean, cozy space with one of our mid-tone neutrals.
imageDetailsList.caption: Mid-Tone

imageDetailsList.description: Our muted neutrals play well with natural light and virtually any other color.
imageDetailsList.caption: Muted

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Warm neutrals are the ideal foundation for homes. They effortlessly introduce personality and texture, and are awaiting your personal touch. These tried-and-true shades provide the perfect backdrop for infusing your space with unique character, boundless imagination and calm sophistication.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Popular Warm Neutral Paint Colors | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Transform your home with warm neutral paint colors. Explore cozy beiges, taupes and greens for your home's interior and exterior.

dropdownTypeList.heroTitle: Warm Neutral Paint Colors Picked by our Experts
dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Infusing a gentle glow, subtle richness and quiet elegance, our warm neutrals curated by our Color Experts will bathe your home in comfort and timeless style.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Warm Neutral Paint Colors | Expert Picks | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Transform your home with warm neutral paint colors curated by the experts. Infuse comfort, elegance and livable luxury into every space.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Cool neutrals bring a serene, undeniably modern sensibility to a space, acting as a breath of fresh air that elevates your home's aesthetic. Our color experts have meticulously hand-picked a collection of cool neutral paints to deliver the perfect blend of sophisticated, calm and versatile style.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Neutral Paint Colors | Expert Picks | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover expert-picked Sherwin-Williams cool neutral paint colors. Create a serene, modern, and sophisticated home with these versatile, calming shades.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Cool neutral paint colors offer a fresh and inviting environment where your walls whisper tranquility. Defined by their subtle blue, gray and green undertones, these hues transform a space into a calm, crisp and clean atmosphere. From the softest misty gray to the embrace of a serene green, cool neutral colors provide a versatile foundation for any design style.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Neutral Paint Colors | Cool Neutrals | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Transform your home with cool neutral paint colors. Discover tranquil hues with blue, gray & green undertones for a calm, crisp, and inviting atmosphere.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: For those seeking a crisp, expansive feel, these popular cool neutral paint colors offer an unparalleled ability to transform a space. Whether you're aiming for a minimalist, modern urban or coastal feel, understanding the nuanced power of cool neutrals will help you craft a cohesive and captivating environment.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Popular Cool Neutral Paint Colors | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Refresh your home with cool neutral paint colors. Explore hues with blue, gray and green undertones that offer a serene backdrop for your home.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Dark neutral paint colors are the architects of atmosphere and sophisticated design. These deep hues offer grounded elegance, from the inky depths of charcoal and rich chocolate browns to serene navy and earthy forest greens. These hues offer a dark and moody backdrop while still providing a versatile foundation for other colors and textures to sing.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Neutral Paint Colors | Dark Neutrals | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover dark neutral paint colors that create cozy, intimate interiors and bold, elegant exteriors, from deep grays to moody charcoals.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Warm neutral paint colors are an inviting palette of hues that offer a cozy alternative to cooler tones. Whether you prefer classic beige, sophisticated taupe or soft sage greens, their toasty and inviting feel is a timeless backdrop regardless of your home's decor or style.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Neutral Paint Colors | Warm Neutrals | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Explore warm neutral paint colors with inviting undertones that create timeless, cozy spaces for every room and style.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Neutral colors offer an adaptable foundation that allows your personal style to flourish. However, if you want to make your space feel more expansive, light neutrals are your answer. What these hues lack in color saturation, they make up for in luminous surfaces that provide a fresh canvas that's sophisticated and endlessly versatile.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover light neutral paint colors that brighten rooms and make spaces feel expansive. Learn how to choose the perfect shade for your home.

expertPicksList.title: Expert Picks
expertPicksList.description: Dive into the world of Sherwin-Williams' expert-curated collection of orange hues and infuse your space with personality and sophisticated style.

popularList.title: Popular Oranges
popularList.description: Delve into our most popular orange paint colors and discover how these beloved hues can transform your home.

image1.altText: A vestibule with orange and white walls, plants and bench

image2.altText: A traditional living room with orange wainscoting, area rug and blue accent chairs

imageDetailsList.description: Brighter shades of orange can bring a fun, bold mood to any room.
imageDetailsList.caption: Bright

imageDetailsList.description: For a whimsical energy that doesn’t overwhelm, consider our mid-tone oranges.
imageDetailsList.caption: Mid-Tone

imageDetailsList.description: For a softer, earthier vibe, our muted oranges are just the thing.
imageDetailsList.caption: Muted

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Orange is a color with a vibrant spectrum of emotion, capable of transforming any space into a reflection of warmth, creativity and joy. From the subtle blush of a sunrise to the deep, grounding tones of rich earth, orange paint colors offer a range of moods and expressions that can enhance your home.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Ignite your space with confidence! Explore Sherwin-Williams' expert-curated orange paint colors, hand-picked to deliver vibrant energy and sophisticated warmth.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Orange paint colors are making an impact in home design, captivating homeowners and designers alike with their undeniable appeal. Far from just a seasonal accent, orange paint colors are versatile and can evoke a variety of moods in a space.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Explore Sherwin-Williams' most popular orange paint colors, known for their uplifting energy and transformative warmth in any space.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Dark orange's depth and undeniable warmth offer a sophisticated alternative to its lighter counterparts. Unlike light orange paint colors, which brighten and expand, dark oranges create intimacy, coziness and grounded elegance.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Ground your space in earthy warmth with Sherwin-Williams' deep orange paint colors—a rich palette of rust, terracotta and amber for cozy, refined interiors.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: While orange is inherently a warm color, the concept of cool orange paint colors introduces a sophisticated and nuanced dimension to this vibrant family. Cool oranges incorporate undertones that temper their intensity, leaning instead towards subtle pinks, browns or grays, evoking a sense of calm and understated elegance.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Experience orange with a modern edge. Sherwin-Williams' cool orange paints offer balanced warmth and unexpected sophistication for a refined, contemporary look.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Light orange paint colors offer a fresh and inviting perspective on a beloved hue, presenting a spectrum that beautifully distinguishes itself from its bolder counterparts. While orange is typically known to command immediate attention, light oranges possess a softer, more ethereal quality.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Sherwin-Williams' light orange paint colors offer a delicate, uplifting energy that creates a chic and contemporary feel. Find your perfectly sun-washed hue.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Warm orange paint colors embody the heart of the orange family, offering a spectrum that radiates comfort, energy and an inviting glow. Ranging from rich, earthy tones like burnt orange and terracotta to soft, approachable shades reminiscent of peach and tangerine sherbet, these hues masterfully create welcoming and vibrant spaces.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Capture the beauty of the golden hour. Explore Sherwin-Williams' warm orange paint colors, from rich terracotta to desert sunset hues, for an earthy glow.

data.dropdownTypeListJson:
[
  {
    "dynamicDropDown": "Expert Picks",
    "heroTitle": "Orange Paint Colors",
    "heroDescription": "Orange is a color with a vibrant spectrum of emotion, capable of transforming any space into a reflection of warmth, creativity and joy. From the subtle blush of a sunrise to the deep, grounding tones of rich earth, orange paint colors offer a range of moods and expressions that can enhance your home.",
    "metaTitle": "Orange Paint Colors | Sherwin-Williams",
    "metaDescription": "Ignite your space with confidence! Explore Sherwin-Williams\u0027 expert-curated orange paint colors, hand-picked to deliver vibrant energy and sophisticated warmth."
  },
  {
    "dynamicDropDown": "Popular Oranges",
    "heroTitle": "Popular Orange Paint Colors",
    "heroDescription": "Orange paint colors are making an impact in home design, captivating homeowners and designers alike with their undeniable appeal. Far from just a seasonal accent, orange paint colors are versatile and can evoke a variety of moods in a space.",
    "metaTitle": "Popular Orange Paint Colors | Sherwin-Williams",
    "metaDescription": "Explore Sherwin-Williams\u0027 most popular orange paint colors, known for their uplifting energy and transformative warmth in any space."
  },
  {
    "dynamicDropDown": "Dark Oranges",
    "heroTitle": "Dark Orange Paint Colors",
    "heroDescription": "Dark orange\u0027s depth and undeniable warmth offer a sophisticated alternative to its lighter counterparts. Unlike light orange paint colors, which brighten and expand, dark oranges create intimacy, coziness and grounded elegance.",
    "metaTitle": "Dark Orange Paint Colors | Sherwin-Williams",
    "metaDescription": "Ground your space in earthy warmth with Sherwin-Williams\u0027 deep orange paint colors—a rich palette of rust, terracotta and amber for cozy, refined interiors."
  },
  {
    "dynamicDropDown": "Cool Oranges",
    "heroTitle": "Cool Orange Paint Colors",
    "heroDescription": "While orange is inherently a warm color, the concept of cool orange paint colors introduces a sophisticated and nuanced dimension to this vibrant family. Cool oranges incorporate undertones that temper their intensity, leaning instead towards subtle pinks, browns or grays, evoking a sense of calm and understated elegance. ",
    "metaTitle": "Cool Orange Paint Colors | Sherwin-Williams",
    "metaDescription": "Experience orange with a modern edge. Sherwin-Williams\u0027 cool orange paints offer balanced warmth and unexpected sophistication for a refined, contemporary look."
  },
  {
    "dynamicDropDown": "Light Oranges",
    "heroTitle": "Light Orange Paint Colors",
    "heroDescription": "Light orange paint colors offer a fresh and inviting perspective on a beloved hue, presenting a spectrum that beautifully distinguishes itself from its bolder counterparts. While orange is typically known to command immediate attention, light oranges possess a softer, more ethereal quality.",
    "metaTitle": "Light Orange Paint Colors | Sherwin-Williams",
    "metaDescription": "Sherwin-Williams\u0027 light orange paint colors offer a delicate, uplifting energy that creates a chic and contemporary feel. Find your perfectly sun-washed hue."
  },
  {
    "dynamicDropDown": "Warm Oranges",
    "heroTitle": "Warm Orange Paint Colors",
    "heroDescription": "Warm orange paint colors embody the heart of the orange family, offering a spectrum that radiates comfort, energy and an inviting glow. Ranging from rich, earthy tones like burnt orange and terracotta to soft, approachable shades reminiscent of peach and tangerine sherbet, these hues masterfully create welcoming and vibrant spaces.",
    "metaTitle": "Warm Orange Paint Colors | Sherwin-Williams",
    "metaDescription": "Capture the beauty of the golden hour. Explore Sherwin-Williams\u0027 warm orange paint colors, from rich terracotta to desert sunset hues, for an earthy glow."
  }
]

expertPicksList.title: Expert Picks
expertPicksList.description: Discover our captivating range of expert-picked purples, offering everything from serene pastels to dramatic, rich hues.

image1.altText: A modern living room with white leather chairs, chandelier, and purple wall

popularList.title: Popular Purples
popularList.description: Meet the hues everyone's talking about — our most sought-after purples, chosen for their undeniable charm and transformative power.

image1.altText: A minimalist office space with wooden table and lavender walls

image2.altText: An open kitchen with white walls and pale purple island

imageDetailsList.description: Make a bold statement and energize your creativity with one of our bright purples.
imageDetailsList.caption: Bright

imageDetailsList.description: Our mid-tone purples hit the sweet spot between fun-loving and chill.
imageDetailsList.caption: Mid-Tone

imageDetailsList.description: Evoke calm and a touch of personality with our muted purples.
imageDetailsList.caption: Muted

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Purple is often associated with royalty, creativity and a touch of the mystical. From soothing lavenders to rich, deep plums, purple paint colors offer a spectrum of moods and expressions for any space. At Sherwin-Williams, our color experts understand the power of this versatile shade.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Find your perfect, defining purple in Sherwin-Williams' collection of expert-picked purple paint colors, from bold to subtle, and everything in between.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Purple paint colors have seen a surge in demand in recent years, becoming one of the most popular paint colors on the market. Far from being just a statement color, today's purples offer a sophisticated spectrum, inviting warmth, creativity and unique personality into any space.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Infuse sophistication into your space. Explore Sherwin-Williams' most popular purple paint shades, trending hues that captivate and inspire. Find your favorite!

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Warm tones in home decor are often confined to browns, beiges and muted yellows. But a beautiful shift is happening with warm purple paint colors captivating homeowners and designers alike. These aren't your cool blue-leaning violets; warm purples are defined by their inviting red undertones, offering a cozy sophistication that's rapidly gaining popularity.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Explore purple's welcoming embrace with Sherwin-Williams' collection of warm purple paint colors, offering rich undertones for a cozy, stylish ambiance.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Light purple paint colors offer a unique blend of serenity and sophistication, transforming any space into a tranquil haven. These lighter tints evoke a sense of calm, creativity and gentle optimism. These versatile shades are most effective in spaces that benefit from soft, diffused lighting or in areas where a touch of color is desired without overwhelming the senses.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Bring delicate charm to your walls. Explore Sherwin-Williams' serene collection of light purple paint colors, perfect for airy, inviting spaces.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Dark purple paint colors are rich, dramatic hues that can transform any space into a deeply luxurious and intimate retreat, exuding unparalleled sophistication. If you’re looking to create a cozy space for relaxation or to be bold with your design style, there are plenty of rich, dark purple shades to strike the right mood.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Evoke drama, luxury & sophistication with dark purple paint colors from Sherwin-Williams. Get tips to transform your home with these deep hues.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: While purple is a blend of red and blue, cool purple paint colors lean heavily into the blue side of the spectrum, giving them a crisp, clean and often ethereal quality. These unique hues hold a special place in interior design, providing a refreshing alternative to traditional neutrals and a tranquil backdrop for modern living.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Explore cool purple paint colors by Sherwin-Williams. Defined by prominent blue undertones, these hues bring calm, sophistication & modern elegance to any room.

expertPicksList.title: Expert Picks
expertPicksList.description: Bring your vision to life with these recommended red shades, tints and tones — specially selected by our team of Color Experts.

image1.altText: A traditional living room with tan furniture and pink walls

popularList.title: Popular Reds
popularList.description: Red paint transforms any room into a captivating experience, from dramatic declarations to subtle warmth. Discover the shade that makes your space truly unforgettable.

image1.altText: A dining room with red walls with table and chairs

image2.altText: A pinkish red wall with side table and lamp

imageDetailsList.description: Our brighter shades of red bring the energy along with exciting contrasts.
imageDetailsList.caption: Bright

imageDetailsList.description: Pick one of our mid-tone reds for a warm but sophisticated look.
imageDetailsList.caption: Mid-Tone

imageDetailsList.description: When you need a soft, warm energy, try one of our muted reds.
imageDetailsList.caption: Muted

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Red paint colors can truly shape the feeling of a space — from bold and sophisticated to fun and playful or even warm and cozy. Use our expert-curated collection of reds to make a statement in your home.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Red Paint Colors | Expert Picks | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Explore our expert-curated collection of reds to make a statement in your home.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: From cozy country kitchens to sophisticated urban living rooms, the right shade of red can transform any space into a vibrant, inviting and luxurious haven. If you're searching for the best red paint to make your home stand out, Sherwin-Williams' collection of popular red paints will help you find a timeless red for your space.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: Our Most Popular Red Paint Colors | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover the most popular red paint colors from Sherwin-Williams — vibrant, energetic tones that range from bold cherry to warm rust, perfect for accent walls, exterior features, or entire rooms. Explore expert tips on lighting, pairing, and the best ways to apply reds confidently.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Light red paint colors are the more nuanced side of the red color spectrum. While red is typically known for its intensity, light red shades invite a different kind of engagement. These softer, often more approachable hues are more versatile than their bolder cousins while offering warmth and character that soothes, uplifts, and adds unexpected charm to any space.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover a fresh selection of light red paint colors from Sherwin-Williams — soft, rosy reds and blush-infused tones ideal for bedrooms, nurseries, or accent walls. Explore undertones, lighting considerations, and simple pairing ideas.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: While bright, fiery reds ignite energy and excitement, the deeper, more muted end of the spectrum offers sophistication and charm. Using dark red hues infuses spaces with depth, warmth and a touch of historical grandeur, enveloping a space with character.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover rich, dramatic dark red paint colors from Sherwin-Williams — deep burgundy, wine, and crimson hues that bring sophistication and depth to dining rooms, accent walls, or exteriors.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Red commands attention with overt warmth, but red’s subset of sophisticated cool-toned hues offers unexpected depth and tranquility. At Sherwin-Williams, we celebrate these distinctive cool red paint colors for their ability to infuse modern design with a fresh, elegant perspective on a timeless classic.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover a refined collection of cool-toned red paint colors from Sherwin-Williams — subtle cherry, berry and wine hues with blue or neutral undertones that create calm elegance in bedrooms, dining rooms and accent walls.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: While every shade of red has its own allure, the captivating spectrum of warm red paint colors invites, comforts, and energizes, wrapping your space in a welcoming embrace. In addition to color, these hues infuse your home with a vibrant, lived-in warmth that feels classic and contemporary.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover warm red paint colors from Sherwin-Williams — rich, inviting hues with orange or brown undertones that bring cozy sophistication to living rooms, dining spaces, and exteriors.

expertPicksList.title: Expert Picks
expertPicksList.description: Trusted by our color experts for consistently delivering stunning results, find the perfect white paint for ultimate design freedom.

image1.altText: A modern living room with textured executive chair, large art piece and white wall

popularList.title: Popular Whites
popularList.description: Discover the white paint colors that have captured the hearts of professionals and DIY-ers alike.

image1.altText: A white entryway with contrasting stairs and wooden side table

image2.altText: A contemporary living room with white walls and furniture

imageDetailsList.description: For a more relaxed, cozier mood, choose a warm white.
imageDetailsList.caption: Warm

imageDetailsList.description: Nothing opens up a space more than a shade of cool white.
imageDetailsList.caption: Cool

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: The spectrum of whites ranges from crisp and cool to soft and inviting, but warm white paint colors truly excel at inviting you into a space and evoking comfort. These nuanced shades, infused with subtle undertones, offer a gentle glow that transforms a room into a sanctuary, proving that warm white paint is anything but one-dimensional.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: White Paint Colors | Warm Whites | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover warm white paint colors with inviting undertones that create cozy, welcoming spaces and complement natural materials for timeless style.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: White paint holds a unique and enduring position in interior design thanks to their ability to offer a fresh canvas that adapts to any style. Not all white paints are the same, nor will they look the same in different spaces, but some shades have earned their place as perennial favorites. Find out how these popular white paints can elevate your home.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: White Paint Colors | Popular Whites | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover the most popular white paint colors from Sherwin-Williams, with tips on choosing a shade of white to create your ideal look for any space.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Beyond a mere absence of color, white paint is the ultimate chameleon, capable of transforming any room into a haven of clean lines, expansive light and sophisticated calm. Explore the curated collection from our experts, designed to elevate your space.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: White Paint Colors | Expert Picks | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Elevate your space with the curated collection of white paint colors selected by Sherwin-Williams color marketing experts.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: The spectrum of white paints offers a range of moods, but cool white paint colors stand apart, defining spaces with a bright, modern edge. Infused with subtle undertones of blue, gray, violet or green, these nuanced cool tones transform rooms into airy, expansive havens with their contemporary appeal.
dropdownTypeList.metaTitle: White Paint Colors | Cool Whites | Sherwin-Williams
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Explore cool white paint colors with crisp undertones that create fresh, modern spaces and pair beautifully with contemporary design styles.

expertPicksList.title: Expert Picks
expertPicksList.description: Our expertly chosen yellows will illuminate your space with timeless appeal and contemporary flair.

image1.altText: A bright yellow wall with rustic side table and wall art

popularList.title: Popular Yellows
popularList.description: Hand-picked for their undeniable charm and versatility, find out why these hues are our most sought-after yellows.

image1.altText: An open dining room with bench seating and a yellow wall

image2.altText: A modern home gym with yoga mat, row machine, and vibrant yellow wall

imageDetailsList.description: To brighten a dark space, nothing provides more vibrancy or optimism than a bright yellow.
imageDetailsList.caption: Bright

imageDetailsList.description: Strike the perfect balance between breezy and bright with one of our mid-tone yellows.
imageDetailsList.caption: Mid-Tone

imageDetailsList.description: Paint your way to positive, peaceful vibes with our muted yellows.
imageDetailsList.caption: Muted

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Yellow paint colors are a perennial favorite in interior design, celebrated for their ability to infuse spaces with warmth and light. Whether you prefer sun-kissed creams or energetic yellows, these sought-after shades are a testament to the enduring appeal of yellow.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover Sherwin-Williams' most popular yellow paint colors, from cheerful pastels to sunny shades, guaranteed to uplift any room.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Yellow is the color of sunshine, optimism and boundless energy. From the softest whisper of dawn to the boldest midday glow, yellow paint colors infuse any space with a welcoming ambiance. With such a diverse spectrum, allow us to guide you through the vibrant world of yellow, helping you confidently choose the perfect shade.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Find trending yellow shades among Sherwin-Williams’ expert curated collection. Learn how to choose the best yellow for your space and explore perfect pairings.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Cool yellow paint colors offer a refreshing departure from traditional yellow's sunny disposition, instead evoking a crisp, fresh and modern feel. While yellow is typically considered a warm color, cool yellows possess a subtle greenish bias, resulting in a less saturated, more serene hue.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Discover the subtle elegance of Sherwin-Williams' cool yellow paint colors, offering shades with green & grey undertones, for a refined, refreshing look.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Dark yellow paint colors delve into the richer, more saturated end of the yellow spectrum, offering a sophisticated depth that traditional yellows often don't. Unlike bright yellows that energize, dark yellows create a moody, enveloping atmosphere, whether for spaces with historical charm or understated luxury.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Delve into Sherwin-Williams' curated collection of rich, dark yellow paint colors to add distinctive character and warmth to your home.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Illuminate spaces with light yellow's gentle radiance, offering a refreshing contrast to their darker counterparts. Invite a delicate touch of sunshine, perfect for creating serene and uplifting environments that don't overwhelm the senses.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Expand your space with delicate brilliance. Find your ideal light yellow paint color from Sherwin-Williams, offering a touch of sophisticated cheer for any room.

dropdownTypeList.heroDescription: Warm yellow paint colors are an invitation to comfort, a whisper of sunshine and a timeless embrace for any space. Unlike their cooler counterparts, warm yellows carry undertones of red, orange or brown, creating a palette that feels inherently inviting, cozy and deeply rooted in nature.
dropdownTypeList.metaDescription: Embrace the comfort of warm yellow paint colors. Find inviting shades, expert tips for choosing the right color & how to design your space.
